name: RUNALL_VERIFIED_RESTRICTED_CONTINUATION_NORM_CONTROL_CONCRETE_ANALYTIC_INPUT_PACKAGE

runall_target_manifest.COMMIT_RULE: Commit only if the targeted verifier and targeted pytest pass.

concrete_pde_or_evolution_equations.domain: restricted continuation cylinder I × Sigma_R with time interval I and restricted spatial region Sigma_R
concrete_pde_or_evolution_equations.evolution_equation: partial_t u = L_R(t, x, D) u + N_R(t, x, u, D u) + F_R(t, x)
concrete_pde_or_evolution_equations.boundary_or_restriction_condition: u is evaluated only on the restricted continuation region Sigma_R and all boundary flux terms are assigned the outward normal convention
concrete_pde_or_evolution_equations.derivative_identity_obligation: derive d/dt E_R(t) + Flux_R(t) <= Source_R(t) from the restricted evolution equation

energy_or_norm_functional.name: E_R(t)
energy_or_norm_functional.finite_energy_regime: E_R(t0) < infinity and all lower_order_control_terms_R(t) are finite on I
energy_or_norm_functional.analytic_estimate_target: sup_{t in I} N_R(t) <= C_R(N_R(t0), source_bound, bootstrap_bound)

flux_sign_convention.normal_orientation: outward normal on the boundary of Sigma_R
flux_sign_convention.nonnegative_flux_obligation: prove Flux_R(t) is nonnegative in the restricted continuation regime

bootstrap_regime.source_bound: Source_R(t) <= S_R(t) with integral_I S_R(t) dt finite
bootstrap_regime.coefficient_bound: restricted coefficients of L_R and N_R are bounded by K_R on I × Sigma_R
bootstrap_regime.closure_obligation: prove the analytic estimate improves or preserves the bootstrap bound on I

bridge_availability.estimate_proof_bridge_available: the concrete package supplies the fields needed by RestrictedContinuationNormControlAnalyticEstimateInputSurface

boundary: this artifact defines the concrete analytic input package shape
this artifact does not derive the derivative identity from the PDE
this artifact does not prove flux nonnegativity
this artifact does not prove bootstrap closure
this artifact does not prove the analytic estimate
this artifact does not prove full RR closure
this artifact does not prove Clay problem closure
finish_condition: Replace this conditional package with checked derivations of derivative identity, flux nonnegativity, bootstrap closure, and bridge availability for the same restricted continuation input surface.
